deadline_notes: Biennial. Certificate number determines year: even cert# → June 30 of even years (incl. 2026 ACTIVE); odd cert# → June 30 of odd years.
notes: Staggered by certificate number. 30% personal development cap (24hr max). LMPA distinction: local municipality CPAs need 16hr/yr with 8hr municipal A&A. 8hr penalty for non-compliance.
